formal_anchor_transform.definition: Let S be the bias-free anchor Conv sum in the cost-7529 graph.
formal_anchor_transform.integrality: endpoint_code is in {0,1,2}, anchor_stencil is integral float32, and input is exactly one-hot, so S is an integer.
formal_anchor_transform.absolute_bound: sum(abs(anchor_stencil))=179 and endpoint_code<=2, hence abs(S)<=358; abs(S+146)<=504 and abs(2*S)<=716.
formal_anchor_transform.float16_exactness: Every integer in these ranges is exactly representable in float16, so Cast(S+146)=S+146 and Cast(2*S)=2*S without rounding.
formal_anchor_transform.rewrite: Remove Conv bias +146, multiply anchor_stencil by 2, and map every comparison threshold t to 2*(t-146).
formal_anchor_transform.validity: Old anchor_valid is S+146>146, i.e. integer S>=1; new anchor_valid is 2*S>=2 using existing fc_two_f16.
formal_anchor_transform.ordering: Multiplication by positive two preserves every TopK ordering and tie.
formal_anchor_transform.consequence: All phase, role, validity, slot, coordinate, permutation, Scatter and final output tensors downstream of the score decisions are unchanged.
